tags.evidence: look at one closely, at the red eye
built for stillness rather than speed
say something true to the birds
begins with learning to see it
who find the nests and say something
what people keep building despite everything
He walks his neighborhood every day
tells the herons, with his words, that he loves them
finds the night heron nests every spring
to leave anyway, eventually
hold the full argument and the full feeling
the feeling itself — named, grounded, located
naming what the dam project's accounting couldn't see
standing waist-deep in a rising river
you can't un-know them
refused to let it sever the relationship
coming back every spring for as long
The neighborhood is not commemorated
kept meeting, so that the next problem
negotiates directly with the city
she can refuse to provide the legitimacy
the naming, the seeing clearly
the seeing clearly
the city had made the rest possible
Taking back space that was given to cars
made something together that none of them could
I watched from the edge
the community gathers to rebuild it
in the morning, the community gathers to rebuild
The Tribunal de las Aguas convenes
convening, in this form, in this place, since
knowledge of what people needed before they asked
A place where people could just be
Once you have the name, you can see it everywhere
Take them there. Let the forest do
the specific quality of silence
stands inside it for long enough
weight low, feet placed softly
the children saw it
to get a group of five-year-olds to be silent
we stalked that deer through the edge
standing in the presence of a tree
You follow the thread
paying attention to what everyone around me
feeling the moisture in the air, noticing
My job is to water it — but carefully
someone notices something they haven't noticed before
I'm maneuvering the conditions
so that a connection can happen
